title: turnera occidentalis
intro: Turnera occidentalis, also known as Damiana, is a flowering plant native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Turnera occidentalis include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as increased libido and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Turnera occidentalis can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
